description: Silent error swallowing in annotation UI: AnnotationForm (L108,132,249), AnnotationGroups (L61,89,101), AnnotationPanel (L186,198,212,225) have bare catch blocks with no rethrow/logging/feedback. Server layer handles errors correctly; annotation UI silently discards them.
resolution: Add no-empty ESLint rule scoped to catch blocks, or a custom rule enforcing catch body content. At minimum each catch should console.warn or surface a toast.
